title: oldenlandia costata
intro: Oldenlandia costata, also known as Sambirawa or Chinese licorice vine, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia costata include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia costata is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
